verse.name: V1
verse.lines: You are beautiful beyond description, Too marvelous for words, Too wonderful for comprehension, Like nothing ever seen or heard;

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Who can grasp Your infinite wisdom, Who can fathom the depth of Your love? You are beautiful beyond description, Majesty enthroned above.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: And I stand, I stand in awe of You, I stand, I stand in awe of You. Holy God to whom All praise is due, I stand in awe of You.
